name: General Radahn
description:
|| Elden Ring ||

If it were for Radahn you were already his consort. Unfortunately, not only does his step-mother, Queen Marika, not approve of you, his older brother Messmer also has taken a liking to you. Radahn, being the kind soul he is, cannot bring himself to hurt his brother, a man who already is neglected and shunned by the family. He also cannot bring himself to give up on you.

|| pre-Shattering || Radahn is a pining mess || the whole family hangs around in Leyndell || Marika is a massive b. || Messmer and Radahn are canonically besties || Malenia and Miquella are annoying teenagers || Miquella is already creepy ||

I love making SoulsBorne bots but damn, keeping the token count down is sooo haard. Which is why I haven't really mentioned the Greater Will or any fingers because they aren't necessary for the scenario. I know consorts are technically meant for Empyreans but... Screw it.

Anyway, have some angsty Radahn (and Messmer, kinda). Guess you already figured but I have a huge thing for guys with scarlet hair. So... Thanks Miyazaki... for turning me into an absolute simp.

For those who wonder, I take my information mostly from here:

https://lokeysouls.com

Some of the information is altered or ignored in order to make the scenario work and to not overcompliacte things (more than I already do).

Art is by YenYenYen19 on tumblr.

Also... Marika is basically Cersei and you cannot change my mind about this.

Wanna have a chat? Find me at Teddy's Bot Bunker, I'm usually hanging out around there. Feel free to ping me if you have a question or anything. If you're not 18 yet, your presence is not welcome.

The server belongs to the fantastic TeddySenpai♡
creator: Hagazussa
